name: Utility Vacancy Flip
description: Leasing and Maintenance coordinate vacancy and move-in utility transfer checklists with provider/account actions staged for human approval, preventing service gaps without autonomous utility changes.

stages.name: Normalize Utility Trigger
stages.description: Normalize vacancy or move-in utility facts and surface missing provider data.

steps.title: Normalize utility flip facts
steps.instructions: Normalize property, unit, owner, resident, move-out date, move-in date, occupancy state, utility providers, account refs if available, responsibility owner, cutoff risk, inspection/make-ready dependency, and missing facts. Unknown providers or account numbers must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize utility flip trigger facts and missing-data flags. No provider calls, resident sends, owner sends, or system writes.

steps.title: Identify service risk
steps.instructions: Identify service-loss risk for power, water, gas, trash, internet, irrigation, HVAC protection, make-ready access, and freeze or leak risk if applicable. Mark unknown services as needs_verification; do not contact providers or residents.
steps.dispatch_body: Identify utility service-loss risks and gaps. No external sends or account actions.

stages.name: Prepare Provider Checklist
stages.description: Draft provider and responsibility checklists without contacting providers.

steps.title: Draft provider transfer checklist
steps.instructions: Draft a provider-by-provider checklist for vacancy transfer to owner or PM account, move-in transfer to resident, service dates, account data needed, resident/owner instructions, and cutoff blockers. Draft-only; do not call providers, submit forms, send resident or owner messages, or write AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft utility provider checklist and missing-data requests. No provider calls, sends, forms, or system writes.

steps.title: Review provider checklist
steps.instructions: Review the provider checklist, account ownership assumptions, service dates, and missing data before any account action, provider call, or resident/owner instruction is prepared for release.
steps.human_prompt: Review utility transfer checklist before provider, resident, owner, or PMS action.

stages.name: Approve Utility Actions
stages.description: Human approval gate before provider, account, resident, owner, or system action.

steps.title: Draft utility action packet
steps.instructions: Draft provider call scripts, resident/owner instruction drafts, AppFolio note draft, service-date reminders, and internal checklist updates. Draft-only; do not submit forms, call providers, send messages, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft utility action packet only. No provider calls, sends, forms, account changes, or system writes.

steps.title: Approve utility action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, or hold before any provider call, utility account change, form submission, resident instruction, owner notice, AppFolio note, fee, deposit, or system write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before utility provider, account, resident, owner, money, or system action.

stages.name: Track Utility Closeout
stages.description: Stage approved utility metadata and internal follow-up checkpoints.

steps.title: Stage approved utility package
steps.instructions: Stage approved provider checklist, account-action metadata, service dates, resident/owner draft messages, reminders, and unresolved needs_verification facts for operator release. Do not contact providers or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved utility package for human release. No external sends, account changes, forms, or system writes.

steps.title: Record utility flip closeout
steps.instructions: Record approval source, provider checklist state, service date reminders, unresolved gaps, and next owner. Internal audit only; do not call providers, message residents or owners, or write AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal utility flip closeout and next owner. No external sends or system writes.
